title: Notocactus arechavaletae
taxonomy: Notocactus arechavaletae is classified within the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Cactoideae and the tribe Cacteae. At the genus level, it is placed within the monotypic genus Notocactus. Notocactus arechavaletae is further classified as a species within the family Cactaceae. It is native to Uruguay and is a part of the cactus family.
uses: Notocactus arechavaletae, also known as the Arechavaleta's nipple cactus, is a species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. Research suggests that its extracts may possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. However, more studies are needed to fully understand its medicinal uses and potential applications. parts: Notocactus arechavaletae is a species of cactus that has been used in traditional medicine.
